name: My Insect Girl Can't Be This Cute
short_description: Warm soft skin, contrasted with hard chitin. It isn't something you've thought of until one day where your curiosity forced an encounter with an actual insect girl! Will you be able to help her integrate into society? Or will there be someone who stands in your way..?
detailed_description:
My Insect Girl Can't Be This Cute is a branching visual novel where your goal is to help Ophelia, a mysterious insect girl you happen upon, integrate into society after being isolated for her whole life.

In MIGCBTC you play as the main character, who happens across Ophelia in an abandoned city. With every choice you make, you get closer and closer to helping her integrate into society. With your friend and landlord Clair's help, and your Mother's wise words of advice, will you be able to pull it off? Or will there be someone to stand in your path..?

There are 6 unique endings, and every interaction you have with the characters in the game has an effect on the ending you will receive.

Ophelia:

-Age: 21yrs old

-Height: 5'0 (152cm)

-Weight: 50.4 lbs (22.8 kg)

-Birthday: Feb 22nd

-Blood Type:

-Likes: Food, Doctors, Animals, Outdoors

-Dislikes: Extreme Hot, Extreme Cold, Bug Spray

Clair:

-Age: 23yrs old

-Height: 5'4 (162.5cm)

-Weight: 123 lbs (55.8 kg)

-Birthday: July 16th

-Blood Type: O+

-Likes: Music, Cooking, Naps

-Dislikes: Needles, Large Groups, Scary Stuff

Mom:

-Age: 45yrs old

-Height: 5'3 (160.02cm)

-Weight: N/A

-Birthday: August 28th

-Blood Type: B+

-Likes: MC, Teaching, Gardening

-Dislikes: Technology, Work, MC (sometimes)
